nodes.context: Criminal organization based in Veneto, Italy, emerged in late 1990s as successor to original Mala del Brenta.
Powerful criminal organization in Veneto during 1970s-1980s, founded by Felice Maniero.
Sicilian Mafia; mentioned as model for NMB structure and as affiliate/ally.
Neapolitan Mafia; mentioned as model for NMB structure and as affiliate/ally.
Calabrian Mafia; mentioned as affiliate/ally of NMB.
Apulian Mafia; mentioned as affiliate/ally of NMB.
Mafia from Foggia; mentioned as affiliate/ally of NMB.
Group of nomad criminals in Veneto, later incorporated under Mala del Brenta.
Group based in Mestre with ties to Mala del Brenta, involved in drug trafficking.
Old criminal underworld of Venice, headed by Rizzi brothers and Giancarlo Millo.
Cartel under Silvano Maritan, rival of another cartel in same area.
Sicilian Mafia group; colluded with Brenta mafiosi in fraudulent scams.
Defunct Neapolitan Mafia organization; listed as ally in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The group is believed to have emerged in the late 1990s as a successor to the original Mala del Brenta
edges.context: Nuova Mala del Brenta is the successor of the original Mala del Brenta.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cosa Nostra, Nuova Camorra Organizzata (defunct)
edges.context: Cosa Nostra is listed as an ally of Nuova Mala del Brenta in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cosa Nostra, Nuova Camorra Organizzata (defunct)
edges.context: Nuova Camorra Organizzata is listed as an ally of Nuova Mala del Brenta in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Its members are exclusively native to the Veneto region, but with a number of associates operating in the region from Cosa Nostra, Camorra and it is believed from the Ndrangheta as well.
edges.context: Camorra members operate as associates of Nuova Mala del Brenta.

edges.evidence_quote: Its members are exclusively native to the Veneto region, but with a number of associates operating in the region from Cosa Nostra, Camorra and it is believed from the Ndrangheta as well.
edges.context: 'Ndrangheta members are believed to operate as associates of Nuova Mala del Brenta.

edges.evidence_quote: It is also known that Brenta mafiosi have colluded with Stidda members on a number of occasions involving a number of fraudulent scams at a Maltese casino in 2002.
edges.context: Nuova Mala del Brenta colluded with Stidda members in fraudulent scams.

edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, just before the emergence of the Mala del Brenta, there were already a few organized crime syndicates that would later be incorporated under the central authority of the Mala del Brenta. These organizations included: - "Clan Giostrai"
edges.context: Clan Giostrai was later incorporated under the central authority of the Mala del Brenta.

edges.evidence_quote: The "Mestrini" group, based in Mestre, on the immediate Venetian mainland: a powerful group with strong ties to the Mala del Brenta
edges.context: Mestrini group had strong ties to the Mala del Brenta.

edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, just before the emergence of the Mala del Brenta, there were already a few organized crime syndicates that would later be incorporated under the central authority of the Mala del Brenta. These organizations included: ... - The "Veneziani"
edges.context: Veneziani were later incorporated under the central authority of the Mala del Brenta.

edges.evidence_quote: The San Donà di Piave cartel, under the leadership of Silvano Maritan, nicknamed "The President", protégé of the confined Cosa Nostra boss Salvatore Contorno, the rivalry with another cartel based in the same area caused a number of violent confrontations and subsequently placed Maritan as capo of the eastern part of the province of Venice, that is until he gave up a percentage of his assets to Maniero.
edges.context: San Donà di Piave cartel was involved with Mala del Brenta; Maritan became capo under Maniero after rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: The San Donà di Piave cartel, under the leadership of Silvano Maritan, nicknamed "The President", protégé of the confined Cosa Nostra boss Salvatore Contorno
edges.context: San Donà di Piave cartel leader Maritan was a protégé of Cosa Nostra boss Salvatore Contorno.
